heading: Considerations
body:
When you view your quantized index [in the Atlas UI](avs-view-index-procedure), the index size might appear larger
than an index without quantization. This is because the **Size** metric
represents the *total data stored*, which includes the Hierarchical Navigable Small Worlds graph
(in memory), the quantized vectors (in memory), and the
full-fidelity vectors (on disk). To estimate the amount of memory
used by the index at query-time, refer to the **Required Memory** metric.
